summary: Comprehensive audit of secretary YAML corruption and tune: deny resolution. Fixed two root-cause bugs: (1) markdown.ts fallbackSanitizer regex at line 43 — added (?:\\([^)]*\\))? to capture parenthesized action keys like verify(action="files") as single tokens, preventing the fallback parser from splitting them into corrupted key/value pairs. (2) packages/core/src/permission.ts evaluate() and disabled() functions — changed from pure findLast (which lets catch-all *: allow override specific tune: deny by merge order alone) to exact-match-first resolution. Also recorded findings about orphan permission key warning gap and normalize() type safety.
friction_summary: Investigation revealed two root bugs: (1) markdown.ts fallbackSanitizer regex missing parenthesized key support — fixed.
